policy_notes: One universe per assignment. Never mix.
Names are persistent identifiers only. No role-play, no catchphrases, no character speech patterns.
Overflow handling: use diegetic expansion (recurring/minor characters) before thematic promotion.

universe_allowlist.name: Apollo Program — Mission Control & flight crews
universe_allowlist.selection_rationale: PR B is a checklist-heavy build pipeline (LaTeX -> PDF) plus a redesign with hard CSP flight rules and a verification gate. Apollo MOCR maps onto this work shape exactly.
